summary: Hands-on core developer and strategic technical engineer with 16 years of expertise building high-performance, resilient distributed systems in C# .NET. Proven track record of spearheading greenfield development, architecting scalable infrastructure from scratch, and optimizing high-volume transaction workflows. I thrive in collaborative, intellectually stimulating environments where I can work closely with business and engineering teams to solve complex problems at scale with real-world impact.

experience.title: SOFTWARE SPECIALIST (TECHNICAL LEAD)
experience.description: Leading the greenfield development of high-concurrency backend services within the Share Trading and Trade Banking domains. Extensively hands-on with C# .NET Core, building scalable, robust systems from scratch to handle large volumes of data with high performance and reliability. Serving as a primary technical liaison between stakeholders and engineering squads, functioning across the full SDLC to deliver strategic banking enhancements and diagnose complex technical issues in production.

experience.title: SENIOR SOFTWARE ENGINEER
experience.description: Engineered scalable high-performance C# .NET solutions for global flight booking engines, successfully handling immense search-traffic load. Led backend performance optimization initiatives, heavily reducing latency across critical paths. Architected data aggregation workflows from the ground up to support sub-300ms multi-provider search strategies, resolving complex business and technical bottlenecks.

experience.title: SOFTWARE SPECIALIST / SENIOR DEVELOPER
experience.description: Developed modern web application platforms and backend services for FNB and Home Lending products. Contributed to major digital transformation projects, writing robust C# .NET services to automate complex lending workflows and integrations. Supported rigorous requirements gathering through to production release.

experience.title: SENIOR DEVELOPER (SUBCONTRACTOR TO ASB)
experience.description: Sub-contracted directly to ASB Bank, initiating work on the digital transformation of FNB and Home Lending products. Built foundational C# .NET backend services to automate complex lending workflows.

experience.title: CREATIVE TECHNOLOGIST (FULL-STACK)
experience.description: Architected multi-modal digital experiences across Computer Vision, AR/VR (XR), and high-scale mobile platforms. Spearheaded the development of complex chatbot ecosystems and low-level driver integrations for enterprise clients. Operated as a key technical pivot between creative design teams and engineering squads, translating high-level concepts into stable, production-ready code in a high-velocity agency environment.
